# Continuity Tracker — The Cartographer's Silence

## Locked Details

- The Pressure Cartography Office is on the third floor of the Administrative Hall
- Dorren has been chief surveyor for 11 years
- The eastern ridge discrepancy is 3mm on the map
- Category Three: Anomalous Drift has been empty for 6 years

## Character States (as of act1-sc01)

### Dorren Hayle
- Location: Pressure Cartography Office
- Emotional state: Controlled unease, defaulting to clinical detachment
- Knowledge: Has noticed the ridge discrepancy, filed it under Category Three
